dominants.dominant_desc:
Kimmy reaches her peak dominance during the Mid-to-Late Game (Levels 8-15) once she has secured her core movement and penetration items. While her early-game wave clear is respectable, she truly begins to take over the map after completing Genius Wand and Glowing Wand, which allow her to shred through the base defenses of most heroes. In this phase, her Traction Pulse Ultimate becomes a game-changing tool for objective contests like Lord or Turtle, enabling her to pull enemies out of position while her terrain-scaling flight allows her to rotate across the map faster than the enemy mid-laner. 

By the time she reaches her full late-game build, she transforms into a relentless artillery unit that can kite entire teams indefinitely, making her the primary win condition for her squad.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Tier 1: Agility — Extra movement speed for better kiting and faster mid-lane rotations.

Tier 2: Wilderness Blessing — Faster movement through the river, essential for ganking side lanes.

Tier 3: Lethal Ignition — Triggers multiple times during her rapid-fire spray for massive burst.

equips.equip_desc: The Hover-Burst build is the definitive choice for a 2026 Mid-Lane Kimmy because it maximizes her transition from a simple marksman into a high-scaling magic powerhouse. By combining Feather of Heaven and Genius Wand, you convert her rapid-fire spray into a specialized defense-shredding tool that reduces enemy resistance to near zero in seconds. The inclusion of Glowing Wand ensures you remain a utility threat by applying constant Anti-Heal and %HP burn to anyone caught in your Traction Pulse vacuum. Finally, the massive power spikes from Holy Crystal and Blood Wings not only amplify your raw damage but also strengthen your late-game shield and mobility, allowing you to dominate team fights with a lethal mixture of infinite kiting and durable aerial pressure.

hero.hero_overview:
Born into a prestigious military family within the Moniyan Empire, Kimmy was raised under the strict discipline of her father, a high-ranking official. However, she was never one to follow tradition. Rejecting the standard sword and shield, Kimmy obsessed over technology, chemical engineering, and inventions, eventually creating her own "Spray Gun"  and "Jetpack" to prove that innovation could win wars. After her 2025-2026 revamp, she has transitioned from a simple Gold Lane Marksman into a high-tempo Mid-Lane Mage.

In her current 2026 form, Kimmy is no longer just about "running and gunning." She has evolved into a tactical artillery unit. Her new Starlium-based mechanics allow her to consume Energy to take flight, passing over terrain and becoming immune to the very slow effects that used to be her downfall. Her Ultimate has been reimagined as a Traction Pulse, transforming from a mere sniper shot into a black-hole-style vacuum that sucks enemies into a localized force field. In the mid-lane, she uses this superior mobility to clear waves instantly and fly over jungle walls for lightning-fast ganks, providing a level of constant magic pressure and crowd control that traditional stationary mages simply cannot match.
hero.hero_strength:
Terrain Scaling: Her revamped Skill 1 allows her to fly over walls, making her immune to slow effects and incredibly difficult to pin down.

Objective Shred: Her basic attacks recover energy on hit, allowing her to melt Turtles and Lords with consistent magic damage that bypasses physical armor.

Endless Kiting: She is the only hero who can move and shoot simultaneously in 360 degrees, making her the queen of "hit-and-run" tactics.
hero.hero_weakness:
Energy Dependency: Without targets to hit, her Energy depletes rapidly. If she runs out of fuel mid-flight, she loses her mobility and damage.

Ultra Squishy: She has one of the lowest HP pools in the game. A single well-timed stun or burst from an assassin will end her streak instantly.

Manual Aim Requirement: None of her skills lock on; if your aim is off, your DPS drops to zero.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Alice is good with Kimmy because their abilities complement each other perfectly in team fights. Alice provides crowd control and durability, while Kimmy delivers continuous damage from a safe distance. When Alice uses her Skill 2 (Flowing Blood) and ultimate (Blood Ode) to dive into enemies, she can disrupt and group opponents together, creating the perfect opportunity for Kimmy to spray her chemical attacks and deal massive area damage. Alices sustain and tankiness also allow her to absorb enemy focus, giving Kimmy the freedom to position safely and attack without being targeted. In addition, Alices slowing and stunning effects help keep enemies within Kimmys attack range, maximizing her damage output. Together, they form a strong combo of frontline pressure and backline firepower.

counters.counter_desc: Ixia counters Kimmy because she has longer attack range, better crowd control, and more consistent damage during fights. Kimmy relies on getting close to enemies to land her shots accurately, but Ixias basic attack range allows her to hit Kimmy safely from a distance. When Kimmy tries to approach, Ixia can use her Skill 2 Passive and Root and Slow to restrict Kimmy movement, making it hard for her to reposition or escape. Additionally, Ixias ultimate lets her fire rapid, accurate shots that dont require manual aiming, easily overpowering Kimmy in direct fights. Since Kimmy depends heavily on mobility and precise aim, Ixias range and control remove those advantages, forcing Kimmy into unfavorable trades and making it difficult for her to fight back effectively

dominants.dominant_desc: Kimmy is strong in the early game because her skills and basic attacks deal high hybrid damage that scales well even without expensive items. She can move and shoot at the same time, allowing her to constantly pressure enemies, poke them safely, and control her lane. Her Skill 2 (Chemical Refinement) provides both damage and mobility, helping her win early trades and escape danger easily. Since her damage output is already powerful from the start, she can quickly clear minion waves, take jungle objectives, and dominate early skirmishes before most heroes reach their power spikes. This strong early presence often allows her team to gain a significant advantage in map control and gold.

Kimmy becomes strong in the late game because, with the right items, her hybrid damage scales extremely well, making her difficult to defend against. Enemies cant easily counter her since she deals both physical and magic damage, forcing them to build mixed defenses. By the late game, Kimmy can continuously deal high burst and sustained damage while still moving and attacking, giving her a big advantage in long team fights. Her mobility allows her to kite melee heroes, dodge skills, and maintain safe positioning while dealing constant pressure. With full items like Genius Wand, Divine Glaive, or Blade of Despair, she can quickly melt both squishy and tanky opponents, making her one of the most dangerous hybrid damage dealers in the late game.

emblems.emblem_desc: The Mage Emblem is best for Kimmy because most of her damage scales with magic power, even though she can also deal some physical damage. Using this emblem boosts her overall magic output, helping her attacks and skills deal more consistent hybrid damage. The Agility talent increases her movement speed, making it easier to kite enemies and maintain safe positioning while firing. Observation adds magic penetration, allowing her to cut through enemy defenses and deal higher damage to tanky heroes. Finally, Impure Rage gives her extra burst damage and energy regeneration, which is important since Kimmys attacks consume energy instead of mana. Altogether, this emblem setup enhances her mobility, sustainability, and damage efficiency perfect for her fast-paced, hit-and-run playstyle.

equips.equip_desc: Burst build is good for Kimmy because it maximizes her hybrid damage potential and allows her to eliminate enemies quickly before they can react. Since most of her damage comes from her skills and chemical energy shots, building items that increase magic power, penetration, and burst potential—like Genius Wand, Glowing Wand, and Divine Glaive—greatly boosts her overall impact. This build lets her poke enemies effectively from a distance and melt squishy targets such as marksmen or mages in just a few hits. Unlike sustained DPS builds that rely on long fights, a burst setup fits Kimmys hit-and-run playstyle, where she deals heavy damage, repositions, and attacks again. It also helps her remain effective even if fights are short, making her a dangerous threat throughout the game, especially in the early and mid stages.

hero.hero_overview: Kimmy Jetson is a genius inventor from the Land of Dawn Eruditio. Born to a strict military father and a mother who valued creativity, Kimmy always stood between science and discipline. Defying conventions, she invented the Chemical Spray Gun a unique weapon that combines magic and technology something her father disapproved of. To prove her worth, Kimmy took her inventions to the battlefield, determined to show that innovation and combat could coexist.
hero.hero_strength: Kimmy's strengths lie in her exceptional mobility and unique hybrid damage output, allowing her to deal both physical and magic damage at the same time. She can move and attack simultaneously, making her effective at kiting enemies and staying safe while dealing consistent damage. Her strong early game presence lets her dominate lanes, pressure opponents, and secure objectives quickly. With her long-range skills, she can continuously poke and harass enemies, while her flexible build options allow her to adapt as either a mage or marksman depending on the teams needs.
hero.hero_weakness: Kimmys main weaknesses come from her reliance on precise aiming and energy management, which make her difficult to master. Since she needs manual control to aim her attacks, missing shots can greatly reduce her damage output. She also has a relatively short attack range compared to other marksmen, making her vulnerable to long-range enemies and assassins. In addition, her damage depends heavily on energy, so overusing skills can leave her unable to fight effectively. Without proper positioning and control, Kimmy can easily be caught and eliminated in team fights.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker is a good battle spell for Kimmy because it gives her an extra layer of mobility and safety, which she needs due to her short range and lack of instant escape skills. Although her Skill 2 Chemical Refinement can push her backward it has a cooldown and cant always save her from sudden threats like assassins or crowd-control effects. Flicker helps Kimmy reposition quickly, escape ganks or chase fleeing enemies when needed. It also allows her to fix positioning mistakes made while aiming manually, giving her more flexibility and survivability during fast paced fights.

hero.hero_overview:
A cool girl who loves technology and invention

Born into a traditional military family in the Moniyan Empire, she received military education from an early age, so she was a little boyish. At the same time, Kimmy is not bound by tradition. She is obsessed with technology and inventions In order to prove herself to her father, Kimmy picks up her invention and joined the Imperial Expeditionary Army.
hero.hero_strength:
Kimmy, a marksman-mage hybrid hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, has undergone a significant revamp that enhances her lethality and versatility in team fights.
 Her primary strength lies in her unique hybrid attack system, where her basic attacks deal both physical and magic damage, and every point of attack speed gained is converted into magic power, allowing her to scale effectively with attack speed items.
 She is exceptionally strong in the early game, capable of aggressive farming and quick rushes due to her high base damage and ability to attack while moving, which provides excellent mobility and sustained damage output.

Kimmy's kit includes several powerful abilities. Her passive, Aerial Dominance, allows her to move and aim independently, and her basic attacks restore Starlium, which enhances her damage and enables her attacks to pierce through multiple targets when fully stacked.
 Skill 1, Anti-Grav Thruster, grants her flight through terrain, immunity to slows, and a movement speed boost, along with dealing damage to nearby enemies.
 Skill 2, Starlium Beam, immobilizes enemies in its path and generates Starlium, while her ultimate, Traction Pulse, deals area damage, slows enemies, and pulls them toward the center, dealing damage based on their current health.

Her strengths are further amplified by her ability to deal massive damage from a distance, especially in the late game, where her ultimate can one-shot squishy targets.
 She excels in team fights when positioned safely behind tanks, and her kit allows her to initiate or follow up effectively depending on her team's composition.
 However, she is fragile and highly reliant on positioning, making her vulnerable to assassins and ganks.
 Her movement speed is considered sluggish, and her attacks require high accuracy, which makes her difficult to master.
 Despite these weaknesses, her revamp has made her a potent and flexible hero in the current meta.
hero.hero_weakness:
Kimmy, a Marksman-Mage hybrid hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, possesses several notable weaknesses despite her strengths. Her primary vulnerability lies in her fragile durability, making her highly susceptible to assassins and burst damage, especially when caught out of position.
 She lacks attack speed, as any attack speed gained from items is converted into magic power, meaning her attack speed remains constant and cannot be increased through standard means.
 This limitation, combined with her sluggish movement speed, hampers her mobility and makes roaming difficult, although her two dash skills help mitigate this to some extent.
 Furthermore, her effectiveness is significantly reduced against heroes equipped with Blade Armor, as her life steal has been nerfed and her enhanced attacks now count as basic attacks, making her vulnerable to such counters.
 Her reliance on high accuracy for both basic attacks and her ultimate skill, Maximum Charge, also makes her challenging to play effectively, particularly under pressure.

dominants.dominant_desc: In Season 37, Kimmy remains a powerful early-game hero if played with precision and awareness. Use her long-range basic attacks to poke enemies safely, especially during the laning phase. Take advantage of her Chemical Refinement (Skill 1) to clear minions fast and zone out opponents, but always be mindful of your energy—unlike most heroes, Kimmy runs on energy, and over-spamming can leave you vulnerable. Since her mobility and slow effects have been nerfed, it's now more important than ever to move smartly while attacking. Strafing and kiting remain essential, but you need to be less aggressive and more calculated. Avoid wasting her ultimate early, as its cooldown is now longer; save it for confirmed kills or key objectives. Prioritize building Demon Shoes for energy sustain, followed by Glowing Wand or Ice Queen Wand for early poke pressure. Be cautious of ganks—Kimmy is squishy, and with her reduced movement speed this patch it's easier for enemies to catch her out of position. hero.hero_overview: Kimmy adalah hero Marksman/Mage yang unik di Mobile Legends. Dia dikenal dengan basic attack-nya yang bisa ditembakkan sambil bergerak dan kemampuannya untuk memberikan damage campuran (Physical dan Magic). Setelah revamp, Kimmy lebih fokus pada Magic Damage dan memiliki skillset yang meningkatkan mobilitas, crowd control, dan burst damage. Dia adalah hero yang sangat baik untuk zoning, poke, dan memberikan damage terus-menerus dalam teamfight.
hero.hero_strength:
Damage Output Tinggi (Magic): Setelah revamp, Kimmy sangat mengandalkan Magic Power. Pasifnya yang mengkonversi Attack Speed menjadi Magic Power membuatnya bisa menghasilkan damage yang sangat besar dengan item magic.
 * Mobilitas Tinggi: Skill 1 (Anti-Grav Thruster) memungkinkan Kimmy bergerak cepat, melewati terrain (dinding), dan menembak sambil bergerak. Ini membuatnya sangat lincah dan sulit ditangkap.
 * Fleksibel dalam Posisi: Kemampuan menembak sambil bergerak membuat Kimmy bisa menjaga posisi yang aman di belakang Tank atau Fighter tim, sambil tetap memberikan damage maksimal.
 * Crowd Control (CC) yang Kuat: Skill 2 (Starlium Beam) memberikan efek immobilize yang bisa mengunci target, dan Ultimate (Traction Pulse) memiliki efek slow dan menarik musuh ke tengah, sangat efektif untuk teamfight.
 * Potensi Zoning dan Poke: Dengan range basic attack dan skill-nya, Kimmy bisa terus-menerus mengganggu dan memberikan damage pada musuh dari jarak aman, memaksa mereka mundur.
 * Kuat di Early Game: Kimmy memiliki damage basic attack yang besar sejak awal permainan, memungkinkannya untuk mendominasi lane dan farming dengan cepat.
 * Sangat Efektif Melawan Hero HP Tebal: Ultimate-nya memberikan damage berdasarkan persentase HP musuh, membuatnya sangat efektif untuk menghancurkan Tank atau Fighter musuh.
hero.hero_weakness:
Rentang Terhadap Burst Damage dan CC: Meskipun lincah, Kimmy memiliki HP yang relatif tipis. Jika terkena burst damage atau crowd control dari musuh, dia bisa langsung tumbang. Hero Assassin atau Mage dengan burst tinggi adalah ancaman besar.
 * Ketergantungan pada Posisi: Meskipun bisa bergerak, Kimmy harus selalu menjaga posisi yang baik. Kesalahan posisi sedikit saja bisa berakibat fatal.
 * Tidak Memiliki Attack Speed (Secara Langsung): Setelah revamp, Kimmy tidak lagi mendapatkan manfaat langsung dari Attack Speed. Ini berarti item Attack Speed tidak akan memberikan damage yang signifikan, dan pemain harus beradaptasi dengan gaya bermain yang lebih fokus pada Magic Power.
 * Sulit Melawan Hero dengan Mobilitas Tinggi: Karena basic attack dan skill-nya tidak mengunci target secara otomatis, hero dengan mobilitas sangat tinggi seperti Fanny atau Ling bisa sulit ditarget oleh Kimmy.
 * Membutuhkan Akurasi Bidikan: Skill 2 (Starlium Beam) membutuhkan akurasi bidikan yang baik untuk mengenai target dan memberikan efek immobilize.
 * Damage ke Turret Berkurang: Basic Attack Kimmy hanya memberikan 60% damage ke Turret, yang berarti dia tidak seefektif marksman lain dalam mendorong turret.
Kimmy adalah hero yang rewarding jika dimainkan dengan benar, tetapi juga membutuhkan pemahaman yang baik tentang posisi dan mekanik skill-nya.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Kimmy as a jungler and Floryn as a support form a perfect match on the battlefield because Floryn's global healing and sustained buffs directly address Kimmy's energy limitations and squishiness, while enhancing her continuous damage output and mobility through a constant supply of energy and crucial healing.

counters.counter_desc: Kimmy can effectively counter Hylos due to her superior kiting potential and continuous magic damage, allowing her to consistently chip away at Hylos' large HP pool and escape his close-range engagement attempts.

Kimmy can effectively counter Atlas due to her exceptional mobility and kiting potential, allowing her to continuously deal damage from a safe distance while dodging his slow-moving initiation skills like Fatal Links and Annihilate, rendering his primary crowd control ineffective against her.

Kimmy can effectively counter Tigreal due to her high mobility and ability to attack while moving, allowing her to easily kite and evade Tigreal's predictable crowd control abilities like Sacred Hammer and Implosion, while continuously dishing out damage from a safe distance.

Kimmy can effectively counter Esmeralda due to her continuous magic damage output, which allows her to consistently chip away at Esmeralda's shield and HP, preventing her from stacking shields effectively and sustaining in prolonged fights.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Early Game (Level 4 - First Turtle/Ganks)
Hit Level 4 Immediately: Once you hit Level 4, your ultimate (Maximum Charge) becomes available, significantly boosting your burst damage and objective securing potential.
Prioritize Turtle: Your primary objective in the early to mid-game is the Turtle. With Retribution and your continuous damage, Kimmy is excellent at securing it. Ping your teammates to assist and zone out enemies. Use your ultimate to burst down the Turtle's HP and secure the last hit with Retribution.
Aggressive Ganking: With your ultimate and the benefits of your upgraded Retribution (Ice for chase/slow, Flame for damage), look for gank opportunities.
Approach: Try to approach from a side bush or behind the enemy.
Initiate: Use Skill 2 (dash) to position yourself or escape if needed. Then, unleash your continuous basic attacks and Skill 1.
Ultimate Usage: Use Maximum Charge for burst damage to secure a kill on a low HP target or to zone out enemies. It's also great for finishing off escaping targets.

During Team Fights (Mid to Late Game)
Positioning is Paramount: Kimmy is squishy. Your main goal is to stay at a safe distance while dishing out continuous damage. Never be at the frontline.
Maintain Distance: Utilize your range and Skill 2 (dash) to keep enemies at arm's length.
Kite, Kite, Kite: Use your ability to move while attacking to kite enemies. If they chase you, run backward while shooting. If they flee, run forward while shooting.
Flank or Stay Behind Tanks: Look for opportunities to flank isolated enemies or stay behind your tanks and fighters, using them as a shield.
Target Prioritization:
Squishy Carries: Focus on enemy Marksmen, Mages, and Assassins. Your continuous damage and ultimate can melt them quickly.
Disengage if Focused: If you get focused by multiple enemies, use Skill 2 to dash to safety and reposition. Don't be afraid to retreat and re-engage when the situation is more favorable.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Mage Emblem (Main Emblem)
The Mage Emblem is the default choice because Kimmy's primary damage source, her "Spray Gun" basic attack, and all her skills, deal Magic Damage. Even though she's classified as a Marksman, her damage type is magical, making Magic Power and Magic Penetration crucial.

Talents:
1. Thrill (Tier 1 - Agility/Movement Speed)

Why it's good for Kimmy: Thrill grants Adaptive Attack, which provides both Physical Attack and Magic Power. For Kimmy, who scales with both (though predominantly Magic Power after the revamp), this gives her an early boost to her damage. More importantly, it often includes movement speed which is vital for Kimmy.

2. Seasoned Hunter (Tier 2 - Jungling/Objective Control)

Accelerated Farming: Kimmy already has a fast jungle clear with her continuous damage. Seasoned Hunter further speeds this up, allowing her to reach her core items and power spikes much earlier.

3. Weakness Finder (Tier 3 - Slow/Utility)
Enhanced Kiting and Chase Potential: Kimmy''s basic attacks are continuous, meaning she can constantly apply the Weakness Finder slow. This makes it incredibly difficult for enemies to chase her down (kiting) and equally easy for her to chase and stick to targets. This synergizes perfectly with her already high inherent mobility.

equips.equip_desc:
This "High Damage - Secure Kill" build for Kimmy prioritizes:
1.  Early Game Snowball: Behemoth Hunter's Arcane Boots with Retribution enables fast jungle clear and objective control.
2.  Sustained Magic Damage: Feather of Heaven and Glowing Wand ensure consistent, high magic damage output, amplified by Kimmy's passive.
3.  Survivability & Sustain: Concentrated Energy provides crucial spell vamp, and Blood Wings offers a large shield and HP boost for late-game resilience.
4.  Penetration: Magic penetration from Arcane Boots and Glowing Wand helps her deal true damage to even tankier enemies.

hero.hero_overview: Kimmy is a unique hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, often described as a hybrid Marksman and Mage due to her reliance on both physical and magical damage. Born into a traditional military family, she is a technology and invention enthusiast who joined the imperial Expeditionary Army. Her distinctive playstyle allows her to move and aim her "Spray Gun" (her basic attack) in different directions simultaneously, offering unparalleled kiting potential and continuous damage output. Unlike most Marksmen, she converts bonus attack speed into movement speed, making her highly mobile. Her skills involve continuously shooting chemical bolts, a dash that leaves a slowing trail, and a powerful long-range ultimate.
hero.hero_strength:
High Mobility and Kiting: Kimmy's passive allows her to move and aim her basic attacks in different directions, making her incredibly slippery and difficult to catch, especially for heroes without strong burst or crowd control. Her conversion of attack speed into movement speed further enhances this.

Strong Early to Mid-Game: She can deal respectable damage early on with just a few core items, coming online much faster than many other carries. This allows her to roam and gank effectively with allies, securing kills and turrets.

Continuous Damage and Poke: Her basic attacks and first skill provide constant damage output, making her excellent for sustained fights and poking enemies from a distance.

Versatile Damage Type: Kimmy can effectively build either physical or magical damage, making her adaptable to different team compositions and enemy resistances. Her attacks deal Magic Damage, allowing her to benefit from magic penetration.

Unique Attack Mechanics: Her ability to shoot while moving and aiming in various directions offers a distinct advantage in positioning and target selection, allowing her to hit enemies even in bushes.

Good Against Immobile Comps: Her ability to kite and continuously deal damage makes her effective against teams with limited mobility or dive potential.
hero.hero_weakness:
Energy Management: Kimmy's primary damage skill (Skill 1) consumes energy, which needs to be carefully managed to maintain her damage output. This can be a significant limitation, especially in the early game.

Vulnerable to Burst and Crowd Control (CC): Despite her mobility, she is relatively squishy and can be easily bursted down by assassins or caught by strong CC abilities, which can nullify her kiting advantage.

Requires High Skill and Aiming: Her unique attack mechanics demand precise aiming, as her basic attacks are often less accurate if not properly controlled. This makes her difficult for beginners to master.

Limited Lifesteal from Skills: While she can build lifesteal, her enhanced basic attacks only benefit from a reduced percentage of it, limiting her sustain compared to other Marksmen.

Item Dependent: While strong early, she still requires specific items to truly shine and become a dominant force, especially in the late game.

Countered by Specific Heroes: Heroes with strong dive capabilities (like Chou, Aldous, Hayabusa, Lancelot, Ling) or those who can reflect basic attacks or apply anti-heal (like Lolita, Blade Armor, Dominance Ice) can significantly counter Kimmy.

spell.spell_desc:
1. Enhanced Jungle Clear and Early Game Impact:

Faster Farming: Kimmy's continuous damage output, even early on, makes her an efficient jungle clearer. Retribution significantly boosts this by providing burst damage to secure creeps faster, accelerating her gold and experience gain. This allows her to reach her power spikes quicker.

Objective Control: Retribution is crucial for securing Lord and Turtle. Kimmy's sustained damage combined with Retribution's true damage burst makes her excellent at contesting these vital objectives, denying them to the enemy and giving her team a significant advantage.

Early Game Ganking Potential: With a faster jungle clear, Kimmy can rotate to lanes earlier to gank. The upgraded Retribution (Ice, Flame, or Bloody) further enhances her ganking.

2. Synergy with Kimmy's Revamped Kit:

Energy Management: Kimmy's main damage skill (Skill 1) consumes energy. Efficient jungle clearing with Retribution allows her to conserve energy for ganks and team fights, as she doesn't have to rely solely on her skills to kill jungle monsters.

Attack Speed to Movement Speed Conversion: Kimmy's unique passive converts excess attack speed into movement speed. While jungle items don't directly give attack speed, the faster clear from Retribution means she spends less time stationary, maximizing her inherent mobility.

Frontline Pierce: The revamp to her passive allows her basic attacks to pierce through targets when her Starlium is maxed. This makes her excellent for team fights and clearing grouped-up jungle camps or minion waves, further benefiting from the rapid farming that Retribution enables.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Similar to Irithel, Revamp Kimmy can move while doing basic attacks. This makes her quite annoying in team fights or chases. The catch is that there's a slight delay before the direction of her attacks adjusts to match your aim, which can feel awkward or clunky, especially in high-pressure situations.
Keep in mind that Skill 1 allows you to vault through walls. This is different from regular dashes, as her jetpack lasts long enough for her to fly over thick walls. You can use this to outmaneuver enemies, even if they have the Flicker Battle Spell.Always try and charge up your Starlium stacks so your basic attacks can penetrate enemies and hit multiple targets. Additionally, you can still gain Starlium stacks even if your enhanced basic attack is active. This means you can extend the duration as long as you can hit enemies.

emblems.emblem_desc:
The Custom Mage Emblem is recommended for Kimmy as her attacks deal Magic Damage. For the first slot, go for Agility for a bit of Movement Speed. The second slot can be Bargain Hunter for cheaper item prices or Weapon Master to get extra stats from items. Weakness Finder is the perfect emblem for the final slot to slow down enemies hit with your attacks.

For the Battle Spell, you will want to have Sprint so you can keep firing while chasing down or running away from enemies. However, you can also go for Purify if the enemy has a ton of Crowd Control effects.

equips.equip_desc:
Kimmy is not your typical Physical Damage marksman because her attacks deal Magic Damage. Start with Arcane Boots for the Magic Penetration. Next, go for Feather of Heaven for additional damage with basic attacks. Go for Concentrated Energy next for the added Hybrid Lifesteal.

Once you reach the late game, you will need Blood Wings for the extra shield and massive Magic Power boost. If you are feeling confident, add more damage items like Divine Glaive and Holy Crystal. If you struggle to survive, change one of the late-game items with either Winter Crown or Immortality.

hero.hero_overview: Kimmy  is a unique marksman-mage hybrid hero known for her continuous basic attacks and skill shots, making her effective in the mid-lane or as a jungler. Her build should focus on magic items like Glowing Wand, Genius Wand, and Divine Glaive to maximize her magic damage. Adding sustain items, such as Ice Queen Wand, boosts her poke potential and mobility, letting her dominate and kite enemies effectively
hero.hero_strength:
Strengths:
Deals high sustained magic damage with basic attacks and skills.

Very mobile with her dash skill, allowing her to reposition quickly.

Good crowd control with slow, immobilize, and pull effects.

Strong poke and harassment during lane phase.

Scales well with magic items, making her flexible in builds.

Can hit multiple enemies with enhanced piercing basic attacks.
hero.hero_weakness:
Requires good aim and positioning to be effective.

Weak in close-range fights if caught without dash.

Vulnerable to burst damage and crowd control.

Needs time and items to scale into mid and late game.

Her skills have delays and need timing to hit properly.

Not beginner-friendly due to unique mechanics and aiming.

spell.spell_desc: For Kimmy  the best spell is generally considered to be Sprint. Sprint enhances Kimmy's mobility, allowing her to quickly engage, chase enemies, or disengage from threats. Kimmy's ability to move while attacking and her reliance on movement speed make Sprint an ideal choice for maximizing her potential.

hero.hero_overview:
Hero Overview
Kimmy is a unique marksman/mage hybrid known for her ability to move and shoot simultaneously. With the recent revamp, Kimmy now has enhanced mobility and smoother skill mechanics, making her even more effective in kiting enemies and dealing sustained damage. Her role remains as a core damage dealer with high poke potential, excelling in jungle or gold lane positions. She thrives with buff control and benefits greatly from early snowballing due to her fast jungle clear and constant pressure in lanes.
hero.hero_strength:
Hero Strength

Kiting Ability: Can move while attacking, making her hard to pin down.

Poke Damage: Deals continuous damage from a safe range using her Chemical Bolts and Energy Transformation.

Versatile Damage: Scales with both Physical and Magic Power, allowing flexible builds.

Fast Jungle Clear: Great farming potential with AoE damage and mobility.

Pressure Play: Can consistently harass enemies in lane and secure objectives with ease.
hero.hero_weakness:
---

Hero Weakness

High Skill Requirement: Aiming her attacks requires precision due to manual aiming.

Squishy: Low durability and easily burst down if caught.

Mana Dependent: Relies heavily on blue buff for sustained DPS.

Weak Crowd Control: Lacks hard CC, making her reliant on teammates for lockdown.

Vulnerable in Late Game: Can be out-scaled by hyper-carries if not properly farmed early.
